# Fictional Glossary

**Brinewing**: a maintenance drone used at the Aurora station to scrub
biofouling from external sensors. Each Brinewing weighs 19 kilograms.

**Kelp corridor**: a strip of cultivated kelp planted between tidal turbine
arrays to dampen turbulence (see the Corvo Tidal Grid).

**Lantern**: the thorium micro-reactor powering the Aurora station.

**Moon pool**: the pressurized wet-porch through which submersibles enter
an underwater habitat.
